query:
-- 1. Update invoice FAC-2026-0004: add productId to Cableski line, link to reservation, set status cobrada
UPDATE invoices 
SET 
  reservationId = 480001,
  status = 'cobrada',
  paymentValidatedAt = NOW(),
  itemsJson = JSON_SET(
    JSON_SET(
      itemsJson,
      '$[1].productId', 30003
    ),
    '$[0].productId', 30004
  )
WHERE invoiceNumber = 'FAC-2026-0004';

-- 2. Update reservation 480001: fix product_id and link to invoice
UPDATE reservations 
SET 
  product_id = 30003,
  invoiceId = 300001,
  invoiceNumber = 'FAC-2026-0004'
WHERE id = 480001;

-- 2. Update reservation 480001: fix product_id and link to invoice

WHERE id = 480001;
